description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image and runs a before_script to install system packages with "apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq libreadline-dev zlib1g-dev" for all jobs. Define a single stage called build. Add a job named build_linux that runs only on tag pipelines (only: tags), is assigned to the build stage, and is limited to runners with the "build" tag. In this job execute the exact shell commands "./autogen.sh", "./configure", and "make" in sequence. No artifacts, caches, or services are defined.
